elements.description: Circled/hexagon numeral '4' marking a vertical post/member at the eave edge, below the roof slope
Vertical dimension line labeled 'ระยะตามแบบสถาปัตย์ ประมาณ ±1.30 ม.' (approximate, per architectural plan) running down beside the post

warnings: This detail (R1) is referenced from section รูปตัด 1 (หน้า13, 'เชิงชาย 1 ดูแบบขยาย R1/A-22') and shows an overhang measured from reference line gridB, matching a 1.50m dimension.

This sheet (A-22) contains 2 distinct views: this eave detail (R1, left half) and a second eave detail (R2, right half) — see sibling _หน้า24_eave_r2.json. Unlike the 1-story sister houses' equivalent sheet (which also included a separate steel sunshade lattice detail), this sheet has only the 2 eave details.

Content and dimensions closely mirror the 1-story sister houses' equivalent eave detail (same 8"+8" fascia board spec, same FLASHING note, same ±1.30m approximate vertical note) — cross-consistent with the shared government housing-program template.
